description: Urban locations are places that are inhabited by sapient beings, that only make sense to exist within a city or village. These should be varied and interesting to make for a colorful and diverse world, and provide good ideas for an urban fantasy setting
locations: Stone arches stride across the lower city, carrying water that glitters in the sun. Moss creeps along the joints between ancient blocks.
Wooden planks stretch over dark water. Fishing boats knock against the posts, and gulls perch on every railing.
Thick timbers driven into the seabed, weathered gray by salt water. Ships tie off and gangplanks lower, connecting sea and city.
